languages.text: "Транспортировка в реальность сказалась и на твоей нервной системе, поразив мнемотические способности? Я внес изменения в твое сознание, чтобы наблюдать, как ты распорядишься своим трофеем. Никто, кроме тебя, не видит и не слышит мою проекцию. Не заставляй своих подданных считать себя безум{mf|цем|ной}, и просто смирись со своей новой ролью наблюдателя".

"Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."
languages.original_text: "Транспортировка в реальность сказалась и на твоей нервной системе, поразив мнемотические способности? Я внес изменения в твое сознание, чтобы наблюдать, как ты распорядишься своим трофеем. Никто, кроме тебя, не видит и не слышит мою проекцию. Не заставляй своих подданных считать себя безум{mf|цем|ной}, и просто смирись со своей новой ролью наблюдателя".

I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

languages.text: «¿Es que el paso al espacio real ha afectado tu sistema nervioso? ¿Te fallan las capacidades mnemónicas? He alterado tu mente para observar cómo utilizas tu trofeo, de modo que nadie salvo tú es capaz de ver esta proyección. No querrás que tus súbditos piensen que has perdido el juicio, por lo que recomiendo que aceptes tu nueva función como mis ojos».
languages.original_text: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: «¿Es que el paso al espacio real ha afectado tu sistema nervioso? ¿Te fallan las capacidades mnemónicas? He alterado tu mente para observar cómo utilizas tu trofeo, de modo que nadie salvo tú es capaz de ver esta proyección. No querrás que tus súbditos piensen que has perdido el juicio, por lo que recomiendo que aceptes tu nueva función como mis ojos».

languages.text: “怎么，返回真实世界的跃迁也影响了你的神经系统，损害了你的记忆能力吗？我对你的大脑进行了一些改造，以便我能观察你如何使用那件战利品。除了你，没有任何人能看到或听到我的投影。如果你不想让你的臣民觉得你发了疯，就乖乖接受你的新角色吧——作为我的‘观察视角’。”
languages.original_text: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: “怎么，返回真实世界的跃迁也影响了你的神经系统，损害了你的记忆能力吗？我对你的大脑进行了一些改造，以便我能观察你如何使用那件战利品。除了你，没有任何人能看到或听到我的投影。如果你不想让你的臣民觉得你发了疯，就乖乖接受你的新角色吧——作为我的‘观察视角’。”

languages.text: « Le retour dans l'espace réel aurait-il affecté votre système nerveux et altéré vos capacités mnémoniques ? J'ai apporté quelques modifications à votre esprit afin d'observer comment vous vous servirez de votre nouveau trophée. Personne d'autre que vous ne peut voir ou entendre ma projection. Et puisque vous ne voulez certainement pas que vos sujets pensent que vous perdez la raison, vous allez vous contenter d'accepter de me servir de fenêtre sur votre vie. »
languages.original_text: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: « Le retour dans l'espace réel aurait-il affecté votre système nerveux et altéré vos capacités mnémoniques ? J'ai apporté quelques modifications à votre esprit afin d'observer comment vous vous servirez de votre nouveau trophée. Personne d'autre que vous ne peut voir ou entendre ma projection. Et puisque vous ne voulez certainement pas que vos sujets pensent que vous perdez la raison, vous allez vous contenter d'accepter de me servir de fenêtre sur votre vie. »

languages.text: "Gerçekuzaya geri dönmek sinir sistemini de mi etkiledi? Belletici yeteneklerini mi bozdu? Ganimetini nasıl kullandığını gözlemleyebilmek için zihninde değişiklikler yaptım. Projeksiyonumu senden başka kimse göremez veya duyamaz. Tebaanın delirdiğini düşünmesini istemezsin, bu yüzden sadece benim bakış açım olma yönündeki yeni rolünü kabul et."
languages.original_text: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: "Gerçekuzaya geri dönmek sinir sistemini de mi etkiledi? Belletici yeteneklerini mi bozdu? Ganimetini nasıl kullandığını gözlemleyebilmek için zihninde değişiklikler yaptım. Projeksiyonumu senden başka kimse göremez veya duyamaz. Tebaanın delirdiğini düşünmesini istemezsin, bu yüzden sadece benim bakış açım olma yönündeki yeni rolünü kabul et."

languages.text: 「リアス空間に戻ったことで、あなたの神経系も影響を受けて、記憶力も低下したのですか。あなたのトロフィーの使い道を観察するために、あなたの心は変更しました。私の投影はあなたしか見たり聞いたりできません。あなたの部下たちがあなたを狂ったと考えるのは避けたいでしょう。ですから、私の視点として、新しい役割を受け入れてください。」
languages.original_text: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: 「リアス空間に戻ったことで、あなたの神経系も影響を受けて、記憶力も低下したのですか。あなたのトロフィーの使い道を観察するために、あなたの心は変更しました。私の投影はあなたしか見たり聞いたりできません。あなたの部下たちがあなたを狂ったと考えるのは避けたいでしょう。ですから、私の視点として、新しい役割を受け入れてください。」

languages.text: "Hat die Rückkehr in den Realraum dein Nervensystem und deine menmonischen Fähigkeiten geschädigt? Ich habe Anpassungen an deinem Verstand vorgenommen, um beobachten zu können, wie du deine Trophäe einsetzt. Niemand außer dir kann meine Projektion sehen oder hören. Deine Untergebenen sollen schließlich nicht denken, dass du den Verstand verloren hast. Also akzeptiere deine neue Rolle als mein Beobachtungspunkt."
languages.original_text: "Has the shift back to realspace affected your nervous system as well, impairing your mnemonic abilities? I have made alterations to your mind so that I may observe how you make use of your trophy. No one but you can see or hear my projection. You do not want your subjects to think you have gone mad, so just accept your new role as my viewpoint."

traits.locale_text: "Hat die Rückkehr in den Realraum dein Nervensystem und deine menmonischen Fähigkeiten geschädigt?
